ideas.name: Mission Reporting Assistant
ideas.desc: Generates mission summaries, KPI dashboards, stakeholder briefs, and trend analyses for federal programs. Produces OMB-ready reports with FISMA compliance, phishing click rates, CSAT, and workforce fill rates across quarterly trends.

ideas.name: Acquisition Support
ideas.desc: Federal acquisition lifecycle support with FAR/DFAR compliance, vendor evaluation, and procurement timeline management. Scores vendor proposals against weighted criteria (technical 35%, past performance 25%, cost 20%, management 10%, small business 10%).

ideas.name: Federal Grants Oversight
ideas.desc: Federal grants monitoring with dashboards, compliance tracking, reporting status, and audit preparation. Tracks 2 CFR 200 compliance, Single Audit Act requirements, SF-425/SF-PPR reporting schedules, and audit findings by severity.

ideas.name: Regulatory Compliance (FISMA/FedRAMP)
ideas.desc: Federal regulatory compliance management with FISMA, FedRAMP, and NIST gap analysis, remediation planning, and audit readiness. Tracks control implementation rates, identifies compliance gaps, and prepares for OIG and GAO examinations.

ideas.name: Workforce Clearance & Onboarding
ideas.desc: Federal workforce clearance tracking, onboarding checklists, background check monitoring, and access provisioning. Tracks investigation timelines across T1-T5 tiers and maps network/physical/system access by clearance level.
